gate_question: Does this exact current protocol, with current live state, allow an unprivileged attacker to extract funds or rewards beyond entitlement?

candidate.title_or_claim: TWAP window collapse via low observation cardinality enables sandwich attack on swapTitanXForTorusAndBuild
candidate.claimed_root_cause: getTorusQuoteForTitanX falls back to oldestObservation when it is less than 900s; with pool cardinality=1 and a recent attacker-controlled swap, oldestObservation collapses to ~12s, making amountOutMinimum near-zero
candidate.claimed_impact: Attacker sandwiches the protocol TitanX swap, extracting up to ~91% of the fair Torus value from protocol-owned TitanX funds

live_preconditions.name: TORUS/TITANX pool oldestObservationSecondsAgo < 900 after attacker manipulation

source_code_basis.why_it_matters: TWAP target is 900s but falls back to oldestObservation unconditionally; if oldestObservation < 900 the window collapses, making the quote manipulable
amountOutMinimum is derived solely from the TWAP quote with 10% slippage; if quote is manipulated near-zero, amountOutMinimum is near-zero and the swap executes with no effective protection
External, unprivileged, nonReentrant entry point that calls _swapTitanXForTorus with protocol-owned TitanX; attacker can call this after manipulating the pool
Returns block.timestamp minus the oldest stored observation timestamp; with cardinality=1 this equals time since last swap, which the attacker controls by being the last trader
Only guard is require(secondsAgo != 0); attacker ensures oldestObservation >= 12 (one block) so this does not revert

attacker_path.actor: unprivileged EOA with sufficient TitanX to move the TORUS/TITANX pool tick significantly
attacker_inputs: Block N: large swap in TORUS/TITANX pool (Torus -> TitanX direction) to push tick to very low Torus price, writing a new observation at block.timestamp(N)
Block N+1: call swapTitanXForTorusAndBuild(deadline) as the triggering transaction; MEV back-run restores pool price
call_sequence: Block N: attacker -> IUniswapV3Pool(titanXTorusPool).swap(...) — manipulates tick, writes observation timestamp T_N
-> getTorusQuoteForTitanX(half): getOldestObservationSecondsAgo returns ~12, secondsAgo = min(900,12) = 12, quote is near-zero
-> ISwapRouter.exactInput executes at manipulated price with no effective floor
Block N+1 (back-run): attacker -> IUniswapV3Pool.swap(...) — restores price, captures price impact profit
state_after: protocol receives fewer Torus than fair market value for the swapped TitanX half
attacker captures price impact delta as MEV profit
attacker receives legitimate INCENTIVE_FEE_BUILD incentive for calling the function

extraction_analysis.asset_or_reward: Protocol-owned TitanX (from totalTitanXForBuild = 5191597325509844865659654507) swapped at manipulated price
extraction_analysis.attacker_gain: MEV sandwich profit equal to the price impact of the manipulated swap; up to ~91% of fair Torus value if 10x price manipulation is achieved (fair_value * 0.1 * 0.9 = 9% of fair value returned to protocol)
extraction_analysis.victim_or_protocol_loss: Protocol receives far fewer Torus tokens than fair market rate for the TitanX spent; the shortfall is captured by the attacker via the back-run
extraction_analysis.why_gain_exceeds_entitlement: Attacker is entitled only to the INCENTIVE_FEE_BUILD caller incentive; the sandwich profit is extracted from protocol funds at the expense of the liquidity pool and future Torus holders

setup: Assert IUniswapV3Pool(pool).slot0() observationCardinality == 1; if > 1 and oldestObservation >= 900, reject finding
Confirm totalTitanXForBuild > 0 and liquidityAddedBuild == true on TorusBuyAndProcess
Fund attacker with sufficient TitanX to move pool tick materially (e.g., 1e27 TitanX via deal())
transaction_sequence: vm.roll(block.number); attacker approves pool and executes large Torus->TitanX swap to push tick to very low Torus price
expected_assertions: assertLt(manipulatedQuote, fairQuote / 5, 'TWAP window collapsed: quote is less than 20% of fair value')
assertLt(torusPurchased, fairQuote * 90 / 100, 'Protocol received less than 90% of fair Torus amount: sandwich extracted value')
local_proof_required.reject_if_assertion_fails: If pool observationCardinality > 1 and getOldestObservationSecondsAgo() >= 900 at the fork block, the TWAP window does not collapse and the finding must be rejected. If torusPurchased >= fairQuote * 90 / 100, slippage protection is sufficient and the finding must be rejected.
